name: fakoli-plugin-critic
description: Five specialist critic agents for Claude Code plugin development — agent-critic (frontmatter/color/tools), skill-critic (lazy-loading/no-fuzzy-detection), hook-critic (contract-aware/${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}), mcp-critic (schema/actor-validation), structure-critic (manifest/CHANGELOG/version-sync). Audit any plugin (your own or any other) with MUST FIX / SHOULD FIX / CONSIDER / NIT verdicts.
